name: omini-runner
description: Production package for the Omini Node runner and schema validation.

scripts.test:js-runtime: node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/fusion/fusion-brain.test.js && node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/runtime/queryengine.smoke.test.mjs && node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/runtime/queryengineRunner.integration.test.mjs && node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/specialists/dependencyImpact.test.mjs && node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/specialists/testSelection.test.mjs && node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/e2e/specialistHardening.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:python
